divergences: Wallpaper is a CSS gradient/arc approximation of a photographic macOS wallpaper; background-only RMSE (~0.144) dominates the remaining full-frame error while the TextEdit+Script Kit window region alone measures ~0.068.

Content verified against reference: header pill "Rewrite “Hey, so basically I thin…”", model label "Script Kit · GPT-5.5", list rows Professional/Concise/Friendly/Direct with matching description text and sparkle icons, footer "Rewrite ↵" / "Actions ⌘ K" all match exactly.

Fine antialiasing/JPEG artifacting around small text (ruler numerals, description ellipsis) and subtle scrollbar-track opacity in the TextEdit pane are left as photographic/rendering-detail noise, not structural mismatches.
